examples: In medieval times, a statue of Venus stood on Il Campo.
The Campo reservation in California is the only one with a working commercial wind farm.
Francisco Madariaga, we now know, was born at the Campo DE Mayo hospital in 1977. His mother is presumed dead.
Just south of here is Campo de'Fiori, with its food and flower market.
Se dan, por ejemplo, casos de personas que se suicidan porque su campo sagrado ha sido asolado.
